title: Amtech A3570 Ear Defenders
features: LIGHTWEIGHT AND COMFORTABLE: These ear defenders have a lightweight design with foam padded cups and are fully adjustable for a comfortable fit
COMPLIANT: They are certified under PPE 2016/425 Directive to EN352-1:2002
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Ear defenders See more
